rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEANDRUS BENTON SR, DECEASED SEPTEMBER 9, 2010
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Ex Parte Order To Enforce Court Mediated Release To Allow Gayle Benton Martin To Clear Title And Execute All Documents To Sell Real Property Of The Leandrus Benton Sr Trust And Distribute Proceeds Declarations Of Gayle Benton Martin Attorney Gregory L Martin Supporting Gayle Benton Martins Application Declaration Regarding Notice
rulings.Rulings: Ex Parte Application for Order to Enforce Court Mediated Release to Allow Gayle Benton Martin to Clear Title and Execute All Documents to Sell Real Property of the Leandrus Benton Sr. Trust & Distribute Proceeds is denied without prejudice. Applicant seeks relief which is beyond the scope of relief this Court grants via ex parte application or petition. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the Reception Clerk (415-551-3650) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, March 23, 2017.
